hero.label: Yoga · pilates · breath · Bratislava
hero.sub: Aria is a small movement studio in the courtyard at Hviezdoslavovo 14. Vinyasa, yin, pilates, breath work — small classes, real teachers, no influencer noise.
intro.label: First time at Aria?
intro.title: A full week, all classes, €25.
intro.text: Take any class on the schedule for 7 consecutive days. No commitment, no auto-renewal. If you fall in love with us, you can keep going on a regular plan after.
cls.label: Classes
cls.title: Four ways into the practice
cls.text: Different bodies, different days, different reasons. Pick what feels right today — there's no hierarchy.
cls.c1.title: Vinyasa Flow
cls.c1.text: Movement linked to breath. We move, we sweat a little, we wake up the body. The bread-and-butter class.
cls.c2.title: Yin & restorative
cls.c2.text: Long-held passive poses, supported with bolsters and blocks. The class your nervous system has been asking for.
cls.c3.title: Mat Pilates
cls.c3.text: Core, glutes, and the deep stabilizers most people forget exist. Strong, slow, precise.
cls.c4.title: Breath & meditation
cls.c4.text: No mat needed. Just sit. We guide breath patterns and a short meditation. Best on a Wednesday lunchtime.
sch.label: Weekly schedule
sch.title: A look at this week
sch.text: Booking opens 7 days in advance. Click any class to reserve. Waitlist activates automatically once a class fills up.
sch.legend: Tap any class to book in our app · Holidays off · Drop-ins accepted up to 5 minutes before
tch.label: Teachers
tch.title: Four humans, four ways into the practice.
tch.text: All certified, all teaching for 5+ years. We pick teachers based on how they make you feel after a class — not Instagram followers.
pr.label: Pricing
pr.title: Pay how it suits you
pr.text: No long-term contracts. Cancel any membership anytime — no questions, no fees.
pr.t1.title: Drop-in
pr.t2.title: Unlimited monthly
pr.t3.title: 10-class pack
pr.note: Student / senior 20% off · Couples membership €159/mo · Corporate plans on request.
rev.label: Reviews
rev.title: What our students say
rev.t1: I came for vinyasa, stayed for the yin. The studio is small — 12 mats max — and I've never felt rushed. The teachers know your name.
rev.t2: I was sceptical about the intro week. By day 4 I'd booked an unlimited monthly. The schedule fits a 9-to-5 perfectly.
rev.t3: I do Lara's Pilates twice a week. My back hasn't hurt in 3 months. That's the metric I care about.
rev.t4: The breath class on Wednesday at noon is genuinely the best 30 minutes of my work week. I lock it in like a meeting.
rev.t5: I'm not a yoga person. I do strength and run. The pilates here actually improved my running form. Quietly impressive.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1: I've never done yoga. Where do I start?
faq.a1: Slow flow, yin or pilates. The intro week (€25) is designed for exactly this — try them all in 7 days, see what fits.
faq.a2: Yes. Free mats and props (blocks, straps, bolsters) are available — please bring your own water bottle and a small towel.
faq.a3: Up to 2 weeks per month, free. For longer pauses (holidays, injury) email us — we always sort it out.
faq.q4: What if a class fills up?
faq.a4: Join the waitlist when booking — when somebody cancels, the system promotes the next person automatically and emails you.
faq.a5: Yes. €60/hour with any teacher. Useful if you're returning from injury or want to focus on a specific practice. Email us.
contact.label: Visit us
contact.title: Hviezdoslavovo námestie 14
contact.text: Studio entrance is through the courtyard — look for the sage-green door. Tram 4 stops 60 metres away. Parking in Eurovea (5 min walk).
cookies.text: Cookies help us remember your booking preferences.
